name: holycodex
description: Cost-aware Codex workflows with routed skills, bounded specialists, scoped rules, Git Bash on Windows, and LSP.

interface.shortDescription: Codex agents, routed skills, scoped rules, Git Bash, LSP, code search, and docs lookup.
interface.longDescription: Root remains the default user-facing agent and owns architecture, decisions, integration, and final verification. HolyCodex uses cost-aware decomposition: Luna low handles bounded repository or primary-source research, while Terra high handles isolated implementation. Skills govern method without replacing delegation analysis. Git Bash is mandatory only on native Windows; LSP and Context7 remain cross-platform.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use HolyCodex to implement and verify this task.
